Off Calendar May-18-2021 Continued To Jun-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Beverly Lavin, via ZOOM, counsel for Sylvia Wong, Executor.

The court requests an update from counsel as to the status of filing of either a Petition for Final Distribution or a Status Report. Counsel reports that the estate currently has not assets but is waiting for the resolution of a petition in another estate. The court reminds counsel that a Petition on the Report of Status should have been filed, accordingly. Counsel admits that she should have filed a Status and requests a one-month continuance to prepare one.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to June 15, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is advised that if a Status Petition is filed by June 8, 2021, an appearance may not be required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
